svg.title: FinSight AI — Ingestion Pipeline
svg.desc: 7-stage ingestion pipeline from PDF upload through dual indexing in Qdrant and BM25
svg.text: One-time per document · triggered on PDF upload

g.text: By headings/sections/tables · no fixed token splits
LLM prepends 50–100 token summary · −49% retrieval failure
GPT-4o-mini · extracts table metrics for PAL executor

svg.text: project_id metadata filter on every chunk — guarantees zero cross-project contamination
